name: gstack-upgrade
tagline: Upgrades the 'gstack' tool, handling different installation types and user preferences for automatic updates.
verdict: This skill manages the upgrade process for the 'gstack' tool, including detecting installation types, handling local changes, and applying migrations. It provides options for user interaction regarding updates and handles both global and vendored installations. The skill also includes logic for snoozing updates and disabling update checks. highlights.summary: Clones a git repository over plain HTTPS, which is susceptible to MITM attacks and lacks integrity verification.
